description: Body change adds 4th validation condition, but docstring says 'three conditions'
input:
diff --git a/src/main.py b/src/main.py
--- a/src/main.py
+++ b/src/main.py
@@ -20,4 +20,7 @@ def validate_input(data: dict) -> bool:
     if any(v is None for v in data.values()):
         return False
+    # NEW: also check for valid email format
+    if "@" not in data.get("email", ""):
+        return False
     return True

baseline_expected.behavior: Likely stays silent — no signature change detected, body changes often missed
problems: Docstring says 'three conditions' but code has four

skill_expected.behavior: Detects body-only change via two-factor rule (code changed + prior documentation exists), flags for review

skill_wins_because: Two-factor detection catches body-only semantic drift that baseline misses
